---
title: "Laboratory of Biostatistics, Clinical Epidemiology, Public Health & AI"
---

# Laboratory of Biostatistics, Clinical Epidemiology, Public Health & AI

## Advancing data-driven health research in Ethiopia and beyond

Welcome to the digital home of the **Laboratory of Biostatistics, Clinical Epidemiology, Public Health & AI**.

This platform focuses on:
- Biostatistics
- Clinical epidemiology
- Public health research
- Bayesian and spatiotemporal modeling
- Artificial intelligence in health
- Reproducible research using R and Quarto

## Vision

The long-term vision is to establish an advanced research and training laboratory at **Ambo University, Ethiopia**, supporting:
- students,
- researchers,
- clinicians,
- and public health professionals.

## Research Areas

- Bayesian statistics
- Spatial epidemiology
- Machine learning in healthcare
- Malaria burden modeling
- Maternal and child health
- Public health AI
- Clinical prediction modeling
